segments.text: That's rough, and the forward smash is terrifying too!
segments.original_text: つらい 横スマッシュも怖すぎる

segments.text: That's exactly why Shoe was playing it a bit more reserved
segments.original_text: シューが少し小さかったからこそね

full_text: That's rough, and the forward smash is terrifying too! For real That's exactly why Shoe was playing it a bit more reserved
